title: Markets buoyed by proposed support measures in China
section_path: Markets buoyed by proposed support measures in China
section_path_text: Markets buoyed by proposed support measures in China
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Sentiment was boosted by reports China is set to announced measures to support its economy. This helped offset a risk-off tone across broader markets amid a disappointing earnings season. Image reference: Screenshot 2023-07-21 12.45.43.png | assets/2023-07-21_markets-buoyed-by-proposed-support-measures-in-china_img_screenshot2023-07-21124543_c40872314e25.png
Copper led the base metals sector higher after China said it would introduce measure to support economic growth.
